_description: Actual match outcomes and per-question RBP results from the JTC SportsPredict platform

question_results.text: Will Jonathan David (Canada) score a goal?
Will Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) score or assist a goal?
Will Morocco advance to the quarterfinals?
Will Alphonso Davies (Canada) have 1 or more shots on target?
question_results.note: PERSONAL_ZERO_OVERRIDES_TEAM_CONTEXT validated -- he didn't play at all in 3 of 4 group games and had 0 shots in his lone cameo.

question_results.text: Will the match be decided by a penalty shootout?
Will Brahim Díaz (Morocco) have 1 or more shots on target?
question_results.note: Second-biggest win of the match -- same PERSONAL_ZERO_OVERRIDES_TEAM_CONTEXT logic (only 1 SOT in his prior 4 games) discounted well below a generous liquid market.

question_results.text: Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will there be 4 or more total cards shown?
Will Ismael Saibari (Morocco) score a goal?
Will Canada have 4 or more shots on target?
question_results.note: WORST RESULT OF THE CAMPAIGN. De-shrunk from 0.68 to 0.80 per an over-applied TEAM_SOT_EMPIRICAL_FLOOR + margin-push rule; Canada's 4-for-4 SOT floor had never been tested in a blowout-loss regime, and Canada got blown out 0-3. Full root-cause writeup in JULY3_POSTMORTEM_DEEP_DIVE.md addendum (2026-07-04).

question_results.text: Will Morocco have more corner kicks than Canada?
Will a penalty kick be awarded OR a red card be shown?
Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?

key_lessons: Biggest loss ever: Canada 4+ SOT (-80.83) -- see JULY3_POSTMORTEM_DEEP_DIVE.md addendum for full root-cause analysis (regime-coverage gap in the empirical floor, compounded by an unwarranted margin-push de-shrink).

Biggest wins: Brahim Díaz 1+ SOT (+44.06) and Alphonso Davies 1+ SOT (+30.97) -- both PERSONAL_ZERO_OVERRIDES_TEAM_CONTEXT, both in the SAME match as the biggest loss. Confirms the asymmetry: suppressing on real personal-negative evidence is safe; projecting up from a team-level positive floor is not.
Without Q11 this match would have been +139.75, near season-best.
